code_fix_implemented.summary: Added FinMind-specific proxy controls so operators can bypass a blocked shared HTTP(S)_PROXY for FinMind only or provide a dedicated allowlisted FinMind proxy.

direct_finmind_retry_executed.stderr_stdout_summary: WARNING neither FINMIND_TOKEN nor FINMIND_API_TOKEN is set; ERROR could not resolve FinMind trade date because direct FinMind egress failed DNS resolution: [Errno -3] Temporary failure in name resolution.

live_finmind_success_reason: FALSE because no FinMind rows were retrieved: default HTTPS egress is blocked by the configured proxy with CONNECT 403, no FINMIND_TOKEN/FINMIND_API_TOKEN is present, and the newly added direct-FinMind bypass retry cannot resolve api.finmindtrade.com from this container.
exact_failure_reason: The ingestion pipeline cannot resolve the latest TAIEX trade date because all FinMind TAIEX dataset requests to https://api.finmindtrade.com/api/v4/data fail before reaching FinMind: the configured proxy returns Tunnel connection failed: 403 Forbidden. After implementing the FinMind-specific direct bypass, direct egress still fails in this container with DNS error [Errno -3] Temporary failure in name resolution. No FinMind API response body or rows were returned.
root_cause: Runtime egress configuration, not TDT-RM field transformation: the shared HTTPS proxy blocks CONNECT tunnels to api.finmindtrade.com, and this container also lacks direct DNS/egress for api.finmindtrade.com. A FinMind token is also absent, but authentication was not reached because network setup fails first.
source_dataset_used: TaiwanStockTotalReturnIndex:TAIEX (primary attempted by current ingestion workflow); fallback attempts: TaiwanVariousIndicators5Seconds:TAIEX, TaiwanStockPrice:TAIEX, TaiwanStockPriceAdj:TAIEX
